# Market Playbook — What Do I Trade?

**Auto-generated from gold.db validated_setups.** 817 active strategies across 4 instruments, 11 sessions.
**Snapshot date:** 2026-03-04. Entry models: E1, E2 (dominant). E0 purged. E3 retired.

**HOW TO READ THIS:** Find your Brisbane time below. Each session shows the **best strategies per instrument at each RR level**. Only RR >= 1.5 shown in detail. RR1.0 count noted for reference.

## Notes

- **All strategies are post-cost, FDR-corrected, multi-year validated.**
- **E2** (stop-market) is the dominant entry model. E0 purged Feb 2026. E3 soft-retired.
- **Aperture**: 5m = 5-minute ORB, 15m/30m = wider opening range.
- **Filter types**: NO_FILTER (all days), ORB_G4/G5/G6/G8 (ORB size >= N points), VOL_RV12_N20 (realized vol filter), DIR_LONG (long-only), FAST5/FAST10 (fast-break), CONT (contiguous), NOTUE (exclude Tuesday).
- **AllYrs+**: Every calendar year tested was individually profitable.
- **This file is a SNAPSHOT.** Rebuild after any strategy_validator run.
- **To regenerate:** `python scripts/tools/gen_playbook.py` (requires CSV snapshot in research/output/).
- **Cost model**: Round-trip friction deducted per instrument (see cost_model.py).
- **Brisbane winter** = UTC+10 (no DST). US times shift +/-1hr seasonally (ET DST).
